title: BHU – Junior Research Fellow – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF). Candidates with B.Sc., M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 06-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BHU official website.

basic_details.job_title: BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF). Candidates with B.Sc., M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 06-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BHU official website.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹ 37,000/- p.m. + HRA (1st & 2nd year), ₹ 43,000/- p.m. + HRA (3rd year)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BHU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Banaras Hindu University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026
